description:
Lumocolor
®
whiteboard marker 351
Whiteboard marker with bullet tip
Blistercard containing 1 Lumocolor whiteboard marker, black
Product information
Can be dry-wiped from whiteboards and surfaces like glass and porcelain without leaving a                trace
Fast-drying, low odour
Locked tip
DRY SAFE - can be left uncapped for days without drying up
PP barrel and cap guarantee long service life
Airplane-safe - automatic pressure equalization prevents pen from leaking on board                aircraft
Line width approx. 2.0 mm
Refillable with refill station 488 51
Available in stand-up STAEDTLER box
Housing made of 97% recycled plastic
Article number
351-9 BKDA
Colours:
Made in Germany
Made in Germany
Dry wipe
Can be dry-wiped without residue from whiteboards and smooth surfaces like glass and porcelain
Locked tip
Even when subjected to extremely heavy writing pressure, the tip remains locked in place and cannot be pushed back into the barrel.
Bullet tip
~ 2 mm
Airplane-safe
Automatic pressure equalization prevents pen from leaking on board aircraft
STAEDTLER box
The award -winning original serves as a practical storage box and clever pencil holder at                the same time.
Drying out protection
Refillable
